summary: Classified the five open live-inventory PRs independently. No GitHub mutation, merge, close, or fix PR action is planned because the job blocks merge/fix/raise_pr and the preflight permissions disable instant close and low-signal closeout. All five PRs remain open for normal maintainer/author follow-up, with evidence from hydrated comments, review-bot findings, checks, and linked refs.

actions.reason: Keep open. The PR is not low-signal and cannot be closed, merged, repaired, or replaced under this job's permissions.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up. The PR has focused code but unresolved review-bot findings, stale/rebase signal, and failed proof.
Keep open. The PR is focused and useful, but this job cannot merge/fix it and closeout is not applicable.
Keep open for author/maintainer follow-up. It is a focused feature PR but currently has unresolved correctness blockers and failed proof; fix PRs are blocked by this job.
Keep open. The PR is not low-signal, but unresolved review-bot findings and failed proof block any stronger classification in this close/comment-only inventory job.
